### Product Information

- High end car shampoo that also leaves behind a durable layer of protection

- pH neutral, high lubricity formula

- Adds durable layer of protection

- Boosts durability of existing layers of protection

- Safe on paint, glass, trim, wheels, etc.

- Works great with [Gyeon Smoothie](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Smoothie-P1429/)

- Product Codes: GY-1603, GY-1213

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

92% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 12 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

Gyeon Bathe+ is a high quality shampoo, packed with SiO2 coating technology! This combination takes all of the awesome [Gyeon Bathe](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Bathe-P1421/400-ml-S1/) attributes (pH neutral, high lubricity, thorough cleaning power), and adds in SiO2, which is the essence of popular Gyeon coatings. Bathe+ is safe on all surfaces including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to these surfaces, or boost any protection already applied. Simply wash your car the same way you would with any other auto shampoo, rinse off, and stand back to admire the results. The hydrophobic surface will bead water like crazy and repel future dirt and contamination for a least a few weeks. This not only keeps your vehicle cleaner for longer, but it also helps make future cleanings much easier and less time consuming. Grab a bottle of the Gyeon Bathe+ and protect your car while washing!



**Tip:** Works great when paired with the [Gyeon Smoothie](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Smoothie-P1429/) wash mitt!

### Professional Detailer Reviews

When it comes to maintaining a true paint coating, the choice of car wash soap can make all the difference. Recently, I tried Gyeon Bathe+ as I wanted something to quickly maintain my coated paint and below are my thoughts on this shampoo!

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/Gyeon-Bathe-A-Glossy-Addition-to-Your-Wash-Routine-300x147.jpeg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-bathe-a-glossy-addition-to-your-wash-routine/)

- [Gyeon Bathe+: A Glossy Addition to Your Wash Routine](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-bathe-a-glossy-addition-to-your-wash-routine/) by [Addison Good](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/author/addison-good/)

### Videos

#### GYEON Q M Bathe+

![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/z8pc4sdgbg4/hqdefault.jpg)

#### Q2M Bathe+ 2WAYS of best USE!

![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/4W8oNfnEY_Q/hqdefault.jpg)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Super-slick was with strong and long lasting hydrophobicity.


**


- Slickness for a safe wash

- 3 methods of use

- Instant hydrophobicity 
**


#### Directions

Shake well before use. Pour 15-20 ml into a bucket. Washing the car with a HQ wash mitt in a straight line motion and starting from the top is recommended. For maximum beading, apply a few drops on the mitt and spread over the rinsed surface. Rinse again with clean water. Do not let dry. Do not wash in direct sunlight. Dry with suitable drying towel. ** KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. **

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Sean A. on 5/26/2025

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

This is been my go to maintenance shampoo since 2017/2018. Zero complaints. I have not noticed any change in the formulation. I apply it via a foam cannon, followed by a mitt with a bucket filled it too.

Reviewed by Ira G. on 8/28/2021

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I am very impressed with Bathe . Used as directed using the two bucket method and then a second pass at full strength. As already mentioned this is a low suds product. May try it with the pressure washer next time. I used it first on my coated 19' Mustang and then on my wife's new uncoated Volvo. Both cars looked great (well as great as white can get). Then topped it off with the new Gyeon ceramic detailer. Quite the 1,2 punch. Highly recommend!!

Reviewed by RODERICK J. on 7/1/2021

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Not much bubbly action but reacts very well with the ceramic coat finish. Rinses away very clean and enhances the shine tremendously. Strongly suggested to use this product if your car has been ceramic coated!

[Read all customer reviews of Gyeon Bathe+](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Bathe-P1422/Reviews/)

[** Write your own review](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Bathe-P1422/Reviews/#write)
